passenger.title: Passenger transport across Ukraine
passenger.desc: Comfortable and safe trips between Ukrainian cities. Modern buses and experienced drivers.

groupTransfer.title: Group transfer
groupTransfer.desc: Organized transfers for groups of any size, ideal for trips and meetings.

excursions.title: Bus rental for excursions
excursions.desc: Comfortable and safe travel for excursions and city tours with modern buses.

seaTours.title: Sea tours
seaTours.desc: Routes to popular seaside resorts. Your отдых starts on the road.

schoolBus.title: School bus
schoolBus.desc: Safe and organized transportation for students to excursions and events.

corporate.title: Corporate travel
corporate.desc: Transport service for corporate events, conferences, and team trips.

wedding.title: Wedding bus rental
wedding.desc: Elegant transport for wedding guests. Comfort and punctuality on your special day.

pilgrimage.title: Pilgrimage and religious tours
pilgrimage.desc: Trips to sacred and religious places with respect for your needs.

mourning.title: Mourning transport rental
mourning.desc: Delicate and reliable transportation support for farewell ceremonies.

passenger.title: Flexible booking
passenger.desc: You can reserve a seat for the needed trip on the website for free.

groupTransfer.title: Online purchase
groupTransfer.desc: Instant ticket checkout without queues at the ticket office.

excursions.title: Accurate schedule
excursions.desc: Up-to-date timetable with departures every hour, making trip planning easy.

seaTours.title: Lounge area
seaTours.desc: Wait for your trip in a modern lounge where you can relax with a cup of fragrant coffee.

schoolBus.title: Personal account
schoolBus.desc: Your full trip history is stored in one place on the website.

corporate.title: Infrastructure
corporate.desc: Convenient central location with access to all nearby infrastructure.

text.one: "Autolux-Cherkasy-Plus" LLC has been successfully operating in the passenger bus transportation market for many years. We are a key hub that connects thousands of people, cities, and routes every day.
text.two: From a small start to a strong fleet — our experience works for your comfort. We ensure technical reliability of every vehicle and high service quality.
text.three: Our mission is to provide residents and guests with affordable, reliable, and stable bus connections. We want every passenger to feel respected and safe.
text.four: Our drivers stand out for strong technical knowledge, excellent understanding of Ukraine’s roads, and proven accident-free experience.

promo.one: Flexible ticket management: you can reserve a seat for the route you need for free or make an instant purchase online.
promo.two: Updated departure times are always available online in just a couple of clicks.
promo.three: Sign up and plan your trip in a minute.

adminArea.title: Admin panel
adminArea.description: A separate area for managing trips, team members, and operational processes. It gives you a clean place to build role-based tools without mixing them into the customer profile.

routes.title: Trip management
routes.description: Routes, schedules, departure states, and seat availability are better maintained inside a dedicated admin flow.

team.title: Users and roles
team.description: This is the right place for role assignment, access policies, account verification, and internal permissions.

operations.title: Operational control
operations.description: Finance, service notifications, incidents, and system-level actions should be grouped into one admin workspace.

dispatcherArea.title: Dispatcher panel
dispatcherArea.description: An operational interface for live departures, reservations, and quick passenger communication without the overhead of full admin capabilities.

board.title: Trips board
board.description: This area is a natural fit for near-term departures, trip statuses, delays, and boarding scenarios in real time.

reservations.title: Reservations and seats
reservations.description: A dedicated block for manual booking handling, seat availability checks, and fast conflict resolution.

support.title: Passenger communication
support.description: Calls, confirmations, trip changes, and service notes are best concentrated in the dispatcher interface.
